title: astragalus zoharyi
intro: Astragalus zoharyi, also known as Zohary's milkvetch, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus zoharyi include enhancing the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Astragalus zoharyi is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a dried extract or powder, with the recommended dosage varying depending on the specific preparation and intended use.
